entity.summary: Boba Network automated-market-maker decentralized exchange providing ERC-20 token trading and liquidity pools through an open-source protocol and wallet-connected application.
entity.notes: Current first-party Gin Finance application endpoint remains reachable as a JavaScript application. DefiLlama independently identifies Gin Finance as an open-source AMM DEX on Boba Network for ERC-20 trading and liquidity, and reports current TVL plus recent and cumulative DEX volume. Confidence is medium because detailed first-party documentation is limited in this review pass.

evidence.title: Gin Finance official application
evidence.notes: Current first-party Gin Finance application endpoint remains reachable and serves the JavaScript exchange application shell.

evidence.title: Gin Finance metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies Gin Finance as an open-source Boba Network AMM DEX for liquidity provision and ERC-20 trading and reports current TVL, recent fees, and recent and cumulative DEX volume.

evidence.title: Gin Finance DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Gin Finance as a Boba decentralized exchange.
